title: Consolidate Cabinet semantic canon
goal: Reduce Cabinet ecosystem semantics to one authority matrix, one registry and one generated map while preserving source links and read-only boundaries.

acceptance.assertion: Exactly one maintained authority matrix identifies every source owner and non-authoritative projection.
A single registry-derived ecosystem view is canonical for generated mapping; other views are explicit specialized projections or retired.
Legacy rooms and duplicate prose are linked or archived without losing durable decisions.
CI detects new competing ecosystem canons or manually duplicated authority fields.
